positive: A whimsical, stylized illustration of a celestial forest at dusk. The central focus is a massive, luminous, bioluminescent mushroom cluster with intricate, geometric vein patterns. Surrounding the mushrooms are silhouetted, stylized fauna: soaring, graceful manta rays that resemble gentle butterflies, floating crystal dewdrops, and slender, glowing fox figures. The style should be maximalist modern botanical illustration mixed with Art Nouveau fluidity, using a limited but vibrant color palette of deep indigo, emerald green, ethereal gold, and pearlescent white. Ensure strong, clean silhouettes against a gradient background, emphasizing strong contrast and central symmetry. Designed for high-quality apparel printing, with crisp lines and no gradients that muddy the ink.
negative: text, watermark, logo, signature, poor anatomy, blurry, noisy, low resolution, artifact, jpeg artifacts, bad composition, grayscale, photorealistic, 3d rendering, human, extra limbs, excessive detail, clutter
